title: eriogonum crocatum
intro: Eriogonum crocatum, also known as the Desert Trumpet or Crocatum Buckwheat, is a flowering plant native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of Eriogonum crocatum include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, can be made by infusing the leaves and flowers in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
